mapper.select: select d.dept_id as DEPT_ID, d.parent_dept_id as PARENT_DEPT_ID, d.dept_name as DEPT_NAME, d.is_deleted as IS_DELETED, d.version as VERSION, d.created_at as CREATED_AT, d.created_by as CREATED_BY, d.updated_at as UPDATED_AT, d.updated_by as UPDATED_BY from departments_51 d where d.dept_id = #{deptId} and d.is_deleted = 'n'

select d.dept_id as DEPT_ID, d.parent_dept_id as PARENT_DEPT_ID, d.dept_name as DEPT_NAME, d.is_deleted as IS_DELETED, d.version as VERSION, d.created_at as CREATED_AT, d.created_by as CREATED_BY, d.updated_at as UPDATED_AT, d.updated_by as UPDATED_BY from departments_51 d where d.is_deleted = 'n' order by d.dept_id asc

select d.dept_id as DEPT_ID, d.parent_dept_id as PARENT_DEPT_ID, d.dept_name as DEPT_NAME, d.is_deleted as IS_DELETED, d.version as VERSION, d.created_at as CREATED_AT, d.created_by as CREATED_BY, d.updated_at as UPDATED_AT, d.updated_by as UPDATED_BY from departments_51 d where d.parent_dept_id is null and d.is_deleted = 'n' order by d.dept_id asc

select d.dept_id as DEPT_ID, d.parent_dept_id as PARENT_DEPT_ID, d.dept_name as DEPT_NAME, d.is_deleted as IS_DELETED, d.version as VERSION, d.created_at as CREATED_AT, d.created_by as CREATED_BY, d.updated_at as UPDATED_AT, d.updated_by as UPDATED_BY from departments_51 d where d.parent_dept_id = #{parentDeptId} and d.is_deleted = 'n' order by d.dept_id asc
select p.dept_name as PARENT_DEPT_NAME from departments_51 d inner join departments_51 p on d.parent_dept_id = p.dept_id where d.dept_id = #{deptId} and d.is_deleted = 'n' and p.is_deleted = 'n'
select count(*) as CNT from employees_51 e where e.dept_id = #{deptId} and e.is_deleted = 'n'
mapper.insert: insert into departments_51 ( parent_dept_id, dept_name, is_deleted, version, created_at, created_by ) values ( #{parentDeptId}, #{deptName}, #{isDeleted}, #{version}, #{createdAt}, #{createdBy} )
